**What problem are you trying to solve?**
<!-- e.g. "I can't easily compare two networks side by side" or "I want to export data for my own scripts" -->

**What would the solution look like?**
Describe how you would like WiFi Lens to handle this. Screenshots from other tools are welcome.

**Alternatives you have considered**
Are there workarounds today? Other apps that do this well?

**Is this specific to your setup?**
<!-- e.g. enterprise Wi-Fi, mesh network, specific router brand -->
